params.name: Andersen's Fairytales
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Oct 4, 1872, Hans Christian Andersen finished this famous Denmark collection of fairytales.

There are more than 160 stories in Andersen's Fairy Tales. This book reflected European society in the 19th century. It presented many classical stories, including The Ugly Duckling, The Little Match Girl, and The Little Mermaid. In his works, Andersen praised the kindness and purity of the laborers, and criticized the foolishness, greed, and cruelty of the nobles. His stories have a great impact on f …
